name: Psanan Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Forge and port labor follow volcanic and dormant cycle rhythm inside the 360-day civil calendar
legal_deadlines: Descent rights, port windows, and oath obligations often hinge on heat and ash conditions
shipping_windows: Cooler, navigable periods are crucial for exports; ash surges interrupt regular flow
weather_expectations: Planet of Fire-linked activity and ash seasons dominate expectation
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Renewal customs are public and often tied to rebuilding after damage
public_language_about_time: People use both civil volcanic cycles and Sieve-count ritual language without collapsing them into one
